issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING THE CAR AT APPROXIMATELY 75 MPH DOWN THE HIGHWAY.   SEVERAL WARNING LIGHTS CAME ON IN THE DASH INCLUDING THE CRASH SENSORS, AND THE CAR LOST ALL POWER.  I WAS ABLE TO SAFELY PULL THE CAR OVER TO THE SIDE OF THE ROAD.   I TRIED TO RESTART THE CAR WITH NO SUCCESS.  ON
